ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Current market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which this price record belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the specified date */,
  "ex_dividend" REAL /* Ex-dividend amount on the specified date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio on the specified date */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "adj_volume" INTEGER /* Adjusted volume of shares traded */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "post_market_close" REAL /* Post-market closing price */,
  "trading_volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume compared to the previous day */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that issued the dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid per share */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is paid */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the stock goes ex-dividend */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the company determines which shareholders are eligible for the dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is paid to shareholders */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that underwent a split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the split (e.g., 2 for a 2-for-1 split) */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of split (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_high" REAL /* Predicted high price */,
  "predicted_low" REAL /* Predicted low price */,
  "predicted_close" REAL /* Predicted closing price */,
  "predicted_volume" INTEGER /* Predicted trading volume */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the forecast */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., market capitalization, price-weighted) */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date for the index calculation */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the index is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_history" (
  "index_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index history record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the index on the specified date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index value compared to the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value compared to the previous day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the index (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_history_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
